title: helianthemum tomentosum
intro: Helianthemum tomentosum, also known as rockrose, is a flowering plant species native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant's extracts and oils are believed to have several health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and supporting the immune system. Helianthemum tomentosum can be prepared as a tea, oil, or tincture, and is also used topically in creams and salves for skin conditions and wounds.
